mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAFFIC_REDIS_OUTBOX ( event_type, payload, trace_id, status, retry_count, created_at, status_updated_at ) VALUES ( #{eventType}, #{payload}, #{traceId}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_type, payload, trace_id, status, retry_count, created_at, status_updated_at FROM TRAFFIC_REDIS_OUTBOX WHERE ( status = 'FAIL' OR ( status = 'PENDING' AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(6), INTERVAL #{pendingDelaySeconds} SECOND) ) OR ( status = 'PROCESSING' AND status_updated_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(6), INTERVAL #{processingStuckSeconds} SECOND) ) ) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_OUTBOX SET status = 'PROCESSING', status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status NOT IN ('REVERT', 'FINAL_FAIL')
UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_OUTBOX SET status = 'SUCCESS', status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status NOT IN ('REVERT', 'FINAL_FAIL')
UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_OUTBOX SET status = 'FAIL', status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status NOT IN ('REVERT', 'FINAL_FAIL')
UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_OUTBOX SET status = 'FINAL_FAIL', status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status NOT IN ('REVERT', 'FINAL_FAIL')
UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_OUTBOX SET status = 'FAIL', retry_count = retry_count + 1, status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status NOT IN ('REVERT', 'FINAL_FAIL')
UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_OUTBOX SET status = 'FAIL', retry_count = #{retryCount}, status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status NOT IN ('REVERT', 'FINAL_FAIL')
